text:
Resume the existing autoresearch session in this repository from run 51. Read all project/operator instructions plus .auto/prompt.md, .auto/measure.sh, and .auto/log.jsonl. Preserve and reconcile the currently uncommitted run-51 log line. Continue repeated conservative experiments from its next_action_hint. You are the sole writer. Use the established measurement and checks, append each result to the autoresearch log, commit and push kept changes, and never edit existing conformance.json. Continue until budget or genuine blocker, then report commits/checks/pushes/risks.

## Acceptance Contract
Acceptance level: reviewed
Completion is not accepted from prose alone. End with a structured acceptance report.

Criteria:
- criterion-1: Implement the requested change without widening scope
- criterion-2: Return evidence sufficient for an independent acceptance review

Required evidence: changed-files, tests-added, commands-run, validation-output, residual-risks, no-staged-files

Review gate: required by reviewer.

Finish with a fenced JSON block tagged `acceptance-report` in this shape:
Use empty arrays when no items apply; array fields contain strings unless object entries are shown.
```acceptance-report
{
  "criteriaSatisfied": [
    {
      "id": "criterion-1",
      "status": "satisfied",
      "evidence": "specific proof"
    }
  ],
  "changedFiles": [
    "src/file.ts"
  ],
  "testsAddedOrUpdated": [
    "test/file.test.ts"
  ],
  "commandsRun": [
    {
      "command": "command",
      "result": "passed",
      "summary": "short result"
    }
  ],
  "validationOutput": [
    "validation output or concise summary"
  ],
  "residualRisks": [
    "none"
  ],
  "noStagedFiles": true,
  "diffSummary": "short description of the diff",
  "reviewFindings": [
    "blocker: file.ts:12 - issue found, or no blockers"
  ],
  "manualNotes": "anything else the parent should know"
}
```
